H6403.strongs_def: to slip out, i.e. escape; causatively, to deliver
H6403.kjv_def: calve, carry away safe, deliver, (cause to) escape.

H6409.strongs_def: Paltiel, the name of two Israelites

H6410.derivation: or פְּלַטְיָהוּ; from H6403 (פָּלַט) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has delivered;
H6410.strongs_def: Pelatjah, the name of four Israelites

H6411.strongs_def: Pelajah, the name of three Israelites

H6412.derivation: or פָּלֵיט; or פָּלֵט; from H6403 (פָּלַט);

H6418.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be round;
H6418.strongs_def: a circuit (i.e. district); also a spindle (as whirled); hence, a crutch

H6424.strongs_def: properly, to roll flat, i.e. prepare (a road); also to revolve, i.e. weigh (mentally)

H6426.strongs_def: properly, perhaps to rend, i.e. (by implication) to quiver

H6430.strongs_def: a Pelishtite or inhabitant of Pelesheth

H6431.derivation: from an unused root meaning to flee; swiftness;
H6431.strongs_def: Peleth, the name of two Israelites

H6432.derivation: from the same form as H6431 (פֶּלֶת);

H6434.derivation: from an unused root meaning to turn;
H6434.strongs_def: an angle (of a street or wall)

H6435.strongs_def: properly, removal; used only (in the construction) adverb as conjunction, lest

H6437.strongs_def: to turn; by implication, to face, i.e. appear, look, etc.
H6437.kjv_def: appear, at (even-) tide, behold, cast out, come on, [idiom] corner, dawning, empty, go away, lie, look, mark, pass away, prepare, regard, (have) respect (to), (re-) turn (aside, away, back, face, self), [idiom] right (early).

H6438.strongs_def: an angle; by implication, a pinnacle; figuratively, a chieftain

H6439.derivation: or (more properly,) פְּנִיאֵל; from H6437 (פָּנָה) and H410 (אֵל); face of God;
H6439.strongs_def: Penuel or Peniel, a place East of Jordan; also (as Penuel) the name of two Israelites

H6443.derivation: or פָּנִי; from the same as H6434 (פֵּן);

H6446.derivation: from H6461 (פָּסַס); properly, the palm (of the hand) or sole (of the foot) (compare H6447 (פַּס)); by implication (plural)

H6447.strongs_def: the palm (of the hand, as being spread out)

H6452.kjv_def: halt, become lame, leap, pass over.

H6454.strongs_def: Paseach, the name of two Israelites

H6458.strongs_def: to carve, whether wood or stone

H6489.strongs_def: Pekod, a symbolic name for Babylon
H6489.pos: proper noun with reference to people

H6490.strongs_def: properly, appointed, i.e. a mandate (of God; plural only, collectively, for the Law)

H6496.kjv_def: which had the charge, governor, office, overseer, (that) was set.

H6497.derivation: from an unused root meaning to burst; only used as an architectural term of an ornament similar to H6498 (פַּקֻּעָה),

H6498.strongs_def: the wild cucumber (from splitting open to shed its seeds)

H6499.strongs_def: a bullock (apparently as breaking forth in wild strength, or perhaps as dividing the hoof)
